text.title: IaC DRY Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `IaC DRY Patterns` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: audit
step.action: Grep / AST-scan for repeated blocks; classify by axis of variation.

step.name: decide-per-pattern
step.action: Apply rule-of-three; choose factored / deferred / rejected per pattern.

step.name: refactor
step.action: Introduce for_each, locals, or new leaf module; ensure plan-diff is empty post-refactor.
step.output: Refactor PR with empty plan diff.
